verse.verse_1: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_2: [All] praise is [due] to Allah, Lord of the worlds -
verse.verse_3: The Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful,
verse.verse_4: Sovereign of the Day of Recompense.
verse.verse_5: It is You we worship and You we ask for help.
verse.verse_6: Guide us to the straight path -
verse.verse_7: The path of those upon whom You have bestowed favor, not of those who have evoked [Your] anger or of those who are astray.
